description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow surrounded by a stone-patterned perimeter wall and a green lawn. The structure features a flat roof and a spacious open-plan interior with multiple rooms, including a kitchen, living area, bedrooms, and bathrooms. The backyard includes a large swimming pool, a shaded patio with a red-tiled roof, and outdoor seating areas. There are two cars parked in a driveway on one side, and a small garden area with trees and shrubs. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the indoor and outdoor spaces. The overall design emphasizes open living, outdoor leisure, and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, open-plan interior, large windows, a pool, and a shaded patio within a walled yard.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front and left side of the bungalow, highlighting the driveway with two cars, the main entrance, and the pool area in the backyard.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the rear and left side, focusing on the shaded patio with a red-tiled roof, the pool, and the open lawn area.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the back and right side, emphasizing the patio, pool, and the garage/driveway area with parked cars.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the front and right side, featuring the main entrance, large windows, and a small garden area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
